title: G7 Ministerial Declaration: Montréal, Canada, 8 to 9 December 2025
body: "The declaration sets out G7 digital and tech commitments on:   artificial Intelligence (AI) for growth quantum technologies resilient and competitive digital economy supply chain security   The statement on the SME AI Adoption Blueprint outlines practical actions designed to help small and medium-sized enterprises responsibly adopt and harness AI.  "
